PRIVACY_POLICY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY_POLICY.INTRO: Welcome to Virtual Board Game! Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

DATA_COLLECTION.TITLE: What Information We Collect
DATA_COLLECTION.CONTENT: We collect the following data when you use our services: your email address, username, game history, and in-app purchases. We do not store payment information directly; this is handled by our secure payment provider.

DATA_USAGE.TITLE: How We Use Your Data
DATA_USAGE.CONTENT: Your data is used to provide and improve our services, personalize your experience, and for technical support. We may also use anonymized data for analytics to improve gameplay.

DATA_SHARING.TITLE: Who We Share Your Data With
DATA_SHARING.CONTENT: We do not sell your data. We only share information with trusted partners who help us operate the platform, such as hosting providers or payment processors, under strict confidentiality agreements.

USER_RIGHTS.TITLE: Your Rights
USER_RIGHTS.CONTENT: You can access, update, or delete your account information at any time. If you have concerns about your data, please contact us at support@virtualboardgame.com.

CHANGES.TITLE: Policy Updates
CHANGES.CONTENT: We may update this policy occasionally. Changes will be posted on this page, and your continued use of our services means you agree to the updated terms.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact Us
CONTACT.CONTENT: If you have any questions about our Privacy Policy, please email us at support@virtualboardgame.com.
